chapter_1.title: Oriental flagship aesthetics
chapter_1.summary: Passion L interprets the design language through ceremonial front graphics, an elongated sedan proportion, and an elegant rear profile shaped around executive presence.

chapter_2.title: All-dimensional comfort cabin
chapter_2.summary: The long-wheelbase cabin uses premium seat engineering, panoramic openness, and refined rear-space detailing to match the comfort-first sedan story.

chapter_3.title: HarmonySpace cockpit
chapter_3.summary: HarmonySpace brings the digital flagship expression to Passion L through a wide-format display, seamless ecosystem flow, and a calmer interaction experience.

chapter_4.title: Huawei Qiankun ADS
chapter_4.summary: The assisted-driving chapter is presented with sensor coverage, P2P navigation logic, and all-dimensional collision prevention.

chapter_5.title: Lanhai intelligent super hybrid
chapter_5.summary: Ultra-fast charging, long electric range, and the brand’s hybrid power narrative are grouped together here to echo the powertrain storytelling.

chapter_6.title: Million-level magic carpet chassis
chapter_6.summary: The chassis chapter emphasizes million-level comfort, air suspension, rear-wheel steering, and a sedan body that stays composed even when driven quickly.

chapter_7.title: All-dimensional safety protection
chapter_7.summary: Structural strength, battery protection, and in-cabin privacy and safety finish the sedan with a complete all-dimensional protection story.

hero.title: Voyah Passion
hero.subtitle: Performance electric sedan
hero.description: A sleek electric sedan pairing decisive proportions, a quieter executive cabin, and composed grand-touring confidence.

chapter_1.title: Oriental flowing sedan stance
chapter_1.summary: Passion presents a sleeker electric-sedan stance with crisp shoulder lines, cleaner surfacing, and a calmer premium expression tuned for executive travel.

chapter_2.title: Executive cabin comfort
chapter_2.summary: The cabin chapter centers on quiet travel, refined front and rear seating, and a calmer interior rhythm that gives Passion a genuine grand-touring atmosphere.

chapter_3.title: HarmonySpace digital cockpit
chapter_3.summary: Digital interaction, a wider display atmosphere, and connected travel logic give Passion a cleaner, more intelligent sedan identity without losing its composed tone.

chapter_4.title: Touring confidence
chapter_4.summary: Chassis tuning, intelligent safety logic, and long-distance composure close the route with the same measured confidence expected from Voyah’s executive sedan family.

chapter_5.title: Protective sedan assurance
chapter_5.summary: A reinforced body strategy, clear driver-assistance story, and calmer long-route confidence let Passion finish on a more premium safety note.

chapter_1.title: Flagship luxury
chapter_1.summary: Titan opens with ceremonial full-size SUV proportions, a six-seat flagship posture, and a lounge-grade cabin tone shaped for premium family travel.

chapter_2.title: Flagship intelligence
chapter_2.summary: A digital Harmony-era cockpit, Huawei-assisted driving confidence, and premium in-cabin sound stage define Titan’s flagship intelligence chapter.

chapter_3.title: Flagship performance
chapter_3.summary: A million-class comfort chassis, strong road-to-road capability, and long-range composure shape Titan into a calm yet forceful flagship SUV.

chapter_4.title: Flagship safety
chapter_4.summary: Reinforced body architecture, layered battery shielding, and full-cabin occupant protection complete Titan with flagship-level family security assurance.

hero.title: Voyah Titan Black Edition
hero.subtitle: Stealth-focused luxury SUV
hero.description: A darker, sharper interpretation of the Titan formula with bold finishes and a more dramatic visual tone.

chapter_1.title: Black exterior presence
chapter_1.summary: The Black Edition sets a darker flagship tone with blacked-out trim, a more dramatic front face, and a stealthier premium expression.

chapter_2.title: Black cabin texture
chapter_2.summary: Inside, darker materials, contrast stitching, and the calmer seat architecture keep the cabin aligned with the edition’s more restrained luxury story.

chapter_3.title: Executive intelligence
chapter_3.summary: Assisted driving, smart cockpit interaction, and premium travel comfort keep the Black Edition feeling like a full flagship rather than a trim package.

chapter_4.title: Quiet confidence
chapter_4.summary: Safety structure, battery protection, and wide-cabin calm finish the edition with the same calm confidence expected from the Titan family.

hero.title: Voyah Titan X8
hero.subtitle: Expanded flagship family SUV
hero.description: A Titan derivative tuned for more generous multi-row practicality, calmer family comfort, and long-range travel confidence.

performance.title: Expanded flagship luxury
performance.summary: Titan X8 opens with broad full-size SUV proportions and a family-oriented flagship stance that emphasizes spacious luxury over ceremonial drama.

cockpit.title: Three-row intelligent comfort
cockpit.summary: The cabin narrative highlights easier third-row access, practical family packaging, and a calmer intelligent-cockpit rhythm for daily executive travel.

safety.title: Long-route flagship composure
safety.summary: Composed ride tuning, broad-shouldered stability, and long-route confidence position X8 as the touring-oriented flagship branch of Titan.

hero.title: Voyah FREE+
hero.subtitle: Performance intelligence SUV
hero.description: FREE+ introduces a tighter, more athletic stance to the FREE lineage, matched with class-leading Huawei intelligence and long-range hybrid confidence.

chapter_1.title: City light-and-shadow aesthetics
chapter_1.summary: FREE+ opens with the urban design narrative: sculpted light graphics, athletic SUV proportions, and a more premium city-focused visual identity.

chapter_2.title: Voyah Cabin 2.0
chapter_2.summary: A softer interior palette, comfort-centered packaging, and premium seat and audio details sharpen the cabin chapter.

chapter_3.title: HarmonySpace 5 cockpit
chapter_3.summary: This section follows the digital-cockpit rhythm with voice assistant, seamless device flow, and the HarmonySpace ecosystem presented as a dedicated chapter.

chapter_4.title: Huawei Qiankun ADS 4
chapter_4.summary: The assisted-driving chapter mirrors the sequence: Huawei Qiankun ADS 4, sensor hardware, and P2P parking/navigation functions arranged as one story.

chapter_5.title: Luxury intelligent driving control
chapter_5.summary: FREE+ keeps the performance narrative through its intelligent damping chassis, suspension hardware, four-wheel-drive tuning, and expressive drive-mode presentation.

chapter_6.title: All-dimensional safety fortress
chapter_6.summary: Battery protection, passive body strength, and adaptive chassis tuning complete the comfort-and-control story for FREE+.

hero.title: Voyah FREE 318
hero.subtitle: Intelligent long-range crossover
hero.description: A calm and commanding crossover prioritizing extended-range capability, everyday comfort, and cleaner digital travel logic.

chapter_1.title: Long-range crossover presence
chapter_1.summary: FREE 318 opens with an elevated long-range crossover stance, cleaner touring-oriented SUV proportions, and a calmer visual rhythm built for distance.

chapter_2.title: Relaxed grand-touring cabin
chapter_2.summary: Everyday comfort, calmer seat architecture, and a softer premium cabin rhythm make FREE 318 feel deliberately tuned for long-route travel.

chapter_3.title: Connected cockpit confidence
chapter_3.summary: Harmony-style interaction, connected travel flow, and reassuring digital assistance establish a clean, confidence-led smart cockpit chapter.

chapter_4.title: Electric touring confidence
chapter_4.summary: Battery assurance, charging convenience, and steady long-range behavior keep FREE 318 positioned as a true touring crossover, not a minor trim refresh.

chapter_5.title: Everyday premium versatility
chapter_5.summary: Usability, comfort, and practical luxury close the route with a family-ready crossover tone and a stronger everyday-premium message.

hero.title: New Voyah Courage
hero.subtitle: New luxury pure-electric SUV
hero.description: A new-generation pure-electric SUV with a warm family cabin, long range, and Huawei intelligent driving.

chapter_1.title: Starry embrace cockpit
chapter_1.summary: The story starts with a softer, family-oriented design language, combining star-lit detailing and welcoming surfaces into a more emotional urban SUV identity.

chapter_2.title: A comfortable home
chapter_2.summary: Large interior volume, layered storage, zero-gravity seating, and a family-first comfort story give this section a stronger Courage identity.

chapter_3.title: A playful home
chapter_3.summary: Digital screens, Harmony audio, and emotionally expressive in-cabin lighting turn the third chapter into the more playful family-tech zone seen on the site.

chapter_4.title: A smart home
chapter_4.summary: Huawei Qiankun ADS 4, collision-avoidance systems, and parking/navigation choreography now read as a dedicated smart-driving chapter.

chapter_5.title: An efficient home
chapter_5.summary: The efficiency story combines 800V architecture, long range, ultra-fast charging, and energy-sharing functions into one calm EV chapter.

chapter_6.title: A secure home
chapter_6.summary: Body safety, battery protection, and all-weather assurance close the New Courage story with a family-protection emphasis instead of a feature ending.

hero.title: Voyah Courage
hero.subtitle: Luxury pure-electric family SUV
hero.description: A full-electric SUV focused on expressive design, practical family comfort, and everyday long-range confidence.

chapter_1.title: Original electric SUV design
chapter_1.summary: Courage opens with a clearer family-electric stance, expressive surfaces, and a more approachable SUV identity than the newer launch-led route.

chapter_2.title: Family comfort cabin
chapter_2.summary: The cabin chapter focuses on easier daily comfort, softer lounge-like space, and a more practical family rhythm than a dramatic showpiece interior.

chapter_3.title: Connected family cockpit
chapter_3.summary: Digital displays, connected controls, and everyday-friendly cabin logic give Courage a practical intelligent-cockpit identity.

chapter_4.title: Assisted travel confidence
chapter_4.summary: Driver-assistance features, parking support, and calmer road awareness position Courage as an everyday intelligent SUV rather than a pure launch showcase.

chapter_5.title: Electric range and calm
chapter_5.summary: Battery capacity, high-voltage confidence, and calmer long-route efficiency close the page with a more grounded electric-SUV promise.

chapter_6.title: Protective family assurance
chapter_6.summary: Body protection, battery security, and family reassurance finish Courage with a balanced, practical premium tone.

hero.title: 26 Voyah Dreamer
hero.subtitle: A new-era flagship MPV
hero.description: A new-generation Dreamer with lounge-like comfort, refined long-distance composure, and premium family focus.

chapter_1.title: Flagship luxury
chapter_1.summary: Dreamer 26 opens with a ceremonial MPV presence, a grand family cabin, and second-row luxury that extends a premium hospitality experience.

chapter_2.title: Flagship performance
chapter_2.summary: Super charging, long combined range, and a comfort-first intelligent chassis give Dreamer 26 the effortless long-distance confidence of a premium executive MPV.

chapter_3.title: Flagship intelligence
chapter_3.summary: Huawei Qiankun intelligent driving, Harmony cockpit integration, and an AI-focused interaction layer give Dreamer 26 a more advanced flagship character.

chapter_4.title: Flagship safety
chapter_4.summary: The body shell, occupant protection logic, and battery safety systems are presented with calm, document-like confidence.

hero.title: Voyah Dreamer Champion
hero.subtitle: Special-edition flagship MPV
hero.description: A special Dreamer expression with ceremonial presence, executive lounge comfort, and a more curated premium hospitality tone.

chapter_1.title: Champion flagship presence
chapter_1.summary: Dreamer Champion opens with ceremonial MPV posture, richer flagship detailing, and a distinctly curated special-edition character.

chapter_2.title: Executive lounge hospitality
chapter_2.summary: Second-row comfort, ceremonial seating mood, and a quieter hospitality-first layout give Champion a stronger executive-lounge identity.

chapter_3.title: Connected executive intelligence
chapter_3.summary: Harmony-style interaction, intelligent assistance features, and premium rear-cabin technology establish Champion’s executive-tech chapter with clearer focus.

chapter_4.title: Long-route flagship assurance
chapter_4.summary: Body protection, composed long-route tuning, and MPV-family reassurance close the route with a special-edition interpretation of flagship Dreamer confidence.

hero.title: 25 Voyah Dreamer
hero.subtitle: Panoramic luxury technology flagship MPV
hero.description: A panoramic luxury flagship MPV with premium comfort, intelligent cabin tech, and long-distance composure.

chapter_1.title: Luxury flagship presence
chapter_1.summary: The 25 Dreamer opens with an imposing presence, featuring a large panoramic grille and elegant body lines.

chapter_2.title: Harmony tech cabin
chapter_2.summary: Intelligent screens and advanced driver assistance systems shape the digital experience of this flagship MPV.

chapter_3.title: Executive lounge seating
chapter_3.summary: Zero-gravity seats and premium materials transform the rear cabin into an executive luxury lounge.

chapter_4.title: First-class travel
chapter_4.summary: Superior suspension and ultra-quiet cabin technology ensure every journey feels incredibly smooth and relaxing.

hero.title: Voyah Dreamer Mountain River
hero.subtitle: Scenic travel expression
hero.description: A special Dreamer expression emphasizing serene scenery, warm hospitality, and elegant multi-person travel.

chapter_1.title: Scenic edition presence
chapter_1.summary: Dreamer Mountain River opens with a scenic, hospitality-first interpretation of the Dreamer MPV shape.

chapter_2.title: Warm lounge cabin
chapter_2.summary: The interior narrative emphasizes relaxed seating, shared travel comfort, and a calmer family lounge mood.

chapter_3.title: Travel calm
chapter_3.summary: Long-distance composure and family-oriented calm keep the edition feeling like a scenic companion rather than a standard trim.

chapter_4.title: Shared journeys
chapter_4.summary: The final chapter closes with safety and shared-travel reassurance, keeping the Mountain River tone elegant and familial.

hero.title: 24 Voyah Dreamer
hero.subtitle: Luxury electric MPV
hero.description: A spacious electric MPV created for premium family mobility with broad comfort and reassuring calm.

chapter_1.title: Luxury MPV presence
chapter_1.summary: The 24 Dreamer opens with broad luxury MPV presence, a ceremonial family posture, and a calmer flagship hospitality tone.

chapter_2.title: Rear cabin comfort
chapter_2.summary: This cabin chapter highlights second and third-row comfort, generous family packaging, and lounge-like long-distance composure.

chapter_3.title: Smart family cockpit
chapter_3.summary: Connected screens, intelligent assistance, and premium family convenience define Dreamer’s calm and modern smart-cockpit character.

chapter_4.title: Family safety
chapter_4.summary: Body protection and long-route confidence close the route with a polished flagship MPV family-safety statement.

architecture.essa_body: The 800V platform empowers intelligent control and extreme safety.
architecture.feature_2_desc: Replenish 200km of range in just 5 minutes.

safety.structure_body: Beyond five-star safety. The Voyah structural body utilizes 2000MPa thermo-formed steel in critical intrusion zones, creating an impregnable survival space for all occupants.
safety.battery_body: Active and passive defense mechanisms intercept thermal runaway. Five layers of physical protection meet aerospace-grade heat resistance.

cockpit.os_body: Powered by top-tier Qualcomm Snapdragon 8155/8295 chipsets and deep software integration, the cabin transforms into a dynamic living space capable of OTA evolution.
cockpit.feature_1_desc: Triple-screen arrays spanning the dashboard for uncompromised control.
cockpit.feature_2_desc: Four-zone independent voice control with continuous dialogue.
cockpit.feature_3_desc: One-touch settings for resting, camping, or dynamic driving.
cockpit.feature_4_desc: The intelligent ecosystem continuously upgrades over time.

battery.parallax_body: Deconstructing the next-generation battery architecture. High density meets unparalleled thermal stability.

community.post1_title: Crossing the Alps in my Voyah FREE
community.post1_desc: Tested the air suspension across 500km of unpaved mountain roads today. Zero anxiety, unparalleled comfort.
community.post2_desc: Just installed the latest over-the-air update. The new NOA (Navigate on Autopilot) behaves incredibly smoothly in heavy traffic.
community.post3_desc: Took some shots of the ambient lighting reacting to the driving modes.
